title: Fish's Integrated Minecraft
description: A Minecraft-to-IntelliJ integration that aims to eliminate tedious tasks when coding.
body:
#  Fish's Integrated Minecraft

Fish's Integrated Minecraft makes coding with Minecraft much faster by adding features that directly correlate to coding in IntelliJ.

## ✨ Connecting to IntelliJ

Although **not required** to run the mod, many features require our [IntelliJ plugin](https://github.com/FishIntegratedMinecraft/FIM-IntelliJ) alongside the mod to function properly!

## Main Feature List

- Fast Vector/Location/BoundingBox accessing & editing
- Minecraft world utilities
  - Quick block copying (Location, Center, Blockstate...)
- Shortcut for quick swapping between IntelliJ & Minecraft

## Planned Features
- Entity & Player world utilities (Copying UUIDs, Positions, etc.)
- Customizable IntelliJ trigger classes for projects
- Viewing Vectors/Locations from classes in Minecraft automatically
- ResourcePack-related features
- *and more!*
